name: SEO & Web Tools
description: Comprehensive SEO suite — keyword research, technical audits, content optimization, rank tracking, backlinks, internal linking, schema, and AI SEO workflows.

tools.name: Meta Tag Generator
tools.description: Generate title, description, and meta tags HTML from form inputs.

tools.name: Meta Tags Analyzer
tools.description: Parse pasted HTML to extract and audit meta tags for SEO issues.

tools.name: Keyword Density Checker
tools.description: Count word frequency and density percentages in pasted text or HTML.

tools.name: Robots.txt Generator
tools.description: Build a valid robots.txt file from allow/disallow and sitemap inputs.

tools.name: XML Sitemap Generator
tools.description: Create an XML sitemap from a list of URLs with priority and frequency.

tools.name: Schema Markup Generator
tools.description: Generate JSON-LD structured data for articles, products, FAQs, and more.

tools.name: Open Graph Generator
tools.description: Produce Open Graph (og:) meta tags for social link previews.

tools.name: Twitter Card Generator
tools.description: Build Twitter/X card meta tags and preview the card.

tools.name: SERP Snippet Preview
tools.description: Preview how a page appears in Google results with pixel-width checks.

tools.name: .htaccess Generator
tools.description: Generate .htaccess rules for redirects, caching, and security.

tools.name: URL Slug Generator
tools.description: Convert titles into clean SEO-friendly slugs with stop-word removal.

tools.name: Code to Text Ratio Checker
tools.description: Calculate the ratio of visible text to HTML code from pasted markup.

tools.name: Robots Meta Tag Generator
tools.description: Generate index/noindex/follow robots meta directives.

tools.name: Canonical Tag Generator
tools.description: Create rel=canonical link tags to prevent duplicate content.

tools.name: Hreflang Tag Generator
tools.description: Generate hreflang tags for multilingual and regional targeting.

tools.name: Keyword Combiner
tools.description: Combine and permute keyword lists into broad/phrase/exact match.

tools.name: UTM Builder
tools.description: Generate trackable campaign URLs with UTM source, medium, and name parameters.

tools.name: HTML Tag Stripper
tools.description: Remove HTML tags to extract plain text from markup.

tools.name: Meta Description Length Checker
tools.description: Check meta description length with a live Google search preview.

tools.name: Meta Title Length Checker
tools.description: Check if your page title is the right length for Google search results.

tools.name: Robots.txt Validator
tools.description: Validate robots.txt syntax and test URL allow/block rules.

tools.name: FAQ Schema Generator
tools.description: Generate FAQPage JSON-LD from question/answer pairs.

tools.name: Breadcrumb Schema Generator
tools.description: Create BreadcrumbList structured data from a page path.

tools.name: Redirect Generator
tools.description: Build and explain 301/302 redirect rules for common server configs.

tools.name: Email Extractor
tools.description: Extract or scan pasted text/HTML for exposed email addresses.

tools.name: Readability Score Checker
tools.description: Compute Flesch reading ease and grade-level scores for text.

tools.name: Domain Name Finder
tools.description: Suggest available domain names from your project description — only shows domains that look free to register.

tools.name: LLMs.txt Generator
tools.description: Build an llms.txt file so AI crawlers (ChatGPT, Claude, Google) discover your best pages.

tools.name: Security Headers Generator
tools.description: Generate HSTS, CSP, X-Frame-Options and other OWASP headers for Nginx, Apache, or Cloudflare.

tools.name: ads.txt Generator
tools.description: Create a valid ads.txt file for Google AdSense and ad networks.

tools.name: URL Page SEO Analyzer
tools.description: Paste a page URL to fetch live HTML and audit title, meta, headings, schema, images, and links.

tools.name: Related Keywords Generator
tools.description: Expand seed keywords into questions, commercial modifiers, long-tail phrases, and combinations for research.

tools.name: Keyword Difficulty Estimator
tools.description: Estimate keyword competitiveness from SERP signals like brands, content length, and authority.

tools.name: Search Intent Classifier
tools.description: Classify keywords as informational, commercial, transactional, or navigational with page-type suggestions.

tools.name: XML Sitemap Validator
tools.description: Validate sitemap XML for parse errors, bad URLs, duplicates, lastmod dates, and the 50k limit.

tools.name: Heading Structure Analyzer
tools.description: Audit H1–H6 outlines in page HTML for multiple H1s, skipped levels, and empty headings.

tools.name: SEO Audit Checklist
tools.description: Interactive technical, on-page, E-E-A-T, and link audit checklist with progress saved in your browser.

tools.name: SEO Content Score
tools.description: Score on-page SEO for a draft — keyword placement, density, title/meta length, and scannability.

tools.name: Keyword Rank Tracker
tools.description: Log keyword rankings over time in your browser and export CSV reports — no API key required.

tools.name: Backlink Profile Analyzer
tools.description: Analyze Ahrefs/Semrush/Moz backlink CSV exports for anchors, referring hosts, and follow mix.

tools.name: Disavow File Generator
tools.description: Build a Google Search Console disavow.txt from spam domains and URLs.

tools.name: Internal Link Suggester
tools.description: Suggest internal links from your page list into a draft using keyword overlap scoring.

tools.name: Orphan Page Finder
tools.description: Find sitemap URLs with no internal links and linked URLs missing from the sitemap.

tools.name: Schema Markup Validator
tools.description: Validate JSON-LD structure for FAQ, HowTo, Product, LocalBusiness, and common schema errors.

tools.name: HowTo Schema Generator
tools.description: Generate HowTo JSON-LD structured data from a title and step-by-step list.

tools.name: Local Business Schema Generator
tools.description: Create LocalBusiness JSON-LD with NAP, geo coordinates, and business type.

tools.name: NAP Consistency Checker
tools.description: Compare Name, Address, Phone across local citations to catch local SEO inconsistencies.

tools.name: Content Brief Generator
tools.description: AI SEO content brief with outline, PAA questions, keywords, and on-page checklist.

tools.name: AI Meta Tag Writer
tools.description: AI-written title tags and meta descriptions optimized for CTR and character limits.

tools.name: AI SEO Outline Generator
tools.description: AI article outline with H2/H3 structure tuned for featured snippets and search intent.

tools.name: URL Indexing Toolkit
tools.description: Track URLs, audit index readiness, submit IndexNow to Bing/Yandex, and verify site: index status — an honest indexing workflow.

tools.name: IndexNow URL Submitter
tools.description: Generate an IndexNow key and notify Bing, Yandex, and other engines when your URLs change.

tools.name: Indexing Readiness Checker
tools.description: Audit a live URL for noindex, robots.txt blocks, canonical issues, and other indexability problems.

tools.name: URL Index Status Checker
tools.description: Soft-check whether a URL appears indexed and open Google/Bing site: verification links.

tools.name: AI SEO Page Audit
tools.description: AI technical and on-page SEO audit from pasted HTML or page text with prioritized fixes.
